title: stachys nephrophylla
intro: Stachys nephrophylla, also known as mountain pink or narrow-leaved hedge nettle, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stachys nephrophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
